requirement_topic.en: SSB Conformity Assessment and Import Requirements for EV Chargers in Suriname
requirement_topic.zh: 苏里南电动汽车充电桩SSB合格评定与进口要求
requirement_topic.zht: 蘇里南電動汽車充電樁SSB合格評定與進口要求

summary.en: The Suriname Standards Bureau (SSB), established under the Standards Act and inaugurated in 2007, is the national standards body responsible for standardization, conformity assessment, metrology, and laboratory accreditation in Suriname. SSB is an ISO member and an IEC Affiliate Member, and is affiliated with the CARICOM Regional Organisation for Standards and Quality (CROSQ) and the Pan American Standards Commission (COPANT). SSB's mandate covers the development, maintenance, and promotion of standards and technical regulations, certification of goods, metrology, and accreditation. As of 2026-06-14, a mandatory published SSB conformity assessment programme specifically requiring a Certificate of Conformity (CoC) for whole-unit EV chargers imported into Suriname could not be confirmed from official SSB or government sources. Suriname's EV market is nascent, and formal mandatory certification frameworks for EVSE have likely not yet been enacted as of this date. Exporters must contact SSB and EAS directly to determine: (1) whether a mandatory conformity assessment or CoC is required for the specific EV charger product and HS code; (2) whether any applicable CARICOM or COPANT regional standard applies; (3) customs classification and duty treatment of EV chargers under Suriname's tariff schedule. Dutch is the official language of Suriname; product documentation, labels, and safety instructions for the Suriname market should be prepared in Dutch.
summary.zh: 苏里南标准局（SSB）依据《标准法》设立，于2007年正式成立，是负责苏里南标准化、合格评定、计量和实验室认可的国家标准机构。SSB是ISO成员和IEC联络会员，并附属于加勒比共同体区域标准与质量组织（CROSQ）和泛美标准委员会（COPANT）。SSB职责涵盖标准和技术法规的制定、维护和推广，商品认证、计量和认可。截至2026年6月14日，未能从SSB或政府官方来源确认苏里南已发布的、专门要求对进口EVSE整机进行合格评定或持有合格证书（CoC）的强制性计划。苏里南电动汽车市场极为初期，EVSE正式强制认证框架截至本日期可能尚未颁布。出口商须直接联系SSB和EAS以确认：(1) 具体电动汽车充电桩产品和HS编码是否需要强制合格评定或CoC；(2) 是否有适用的CARICOM或COPANT区域标准；(3) 苏里南关税表下电动汽车充电桩的海关分类和关税处理。荷兰语为苏里南官方语言；面向苏里南市场的产品文件、标签和安全说明应以荷兰语准备。
summary.zht: 蘇里南標準局（SSB）依據《標準法》設立，於2007年正式成立，是負責蘇里南標準化、合格評定、計量和實驗室認可的國家標準機構。SSB是ISO成員和IEC聯絡會員，並附屬於加勒比共同體區域標準與質量組織（CROSQ）和泛美標準委員會（COPANT）。SSB職責涵蓋標準和技術法規的制定、維護和推廣，商品認證、計量和認可。截至2026年6月14日，未能從SSB或政府官方來源確認蘇里南已發佈的、專門要求對進口EVSE整機進行合格評定或持有合格證書（CoC）的強制性計劃。蘇里南電動汽車市場極為初期，EVSE正式強制認證框架截至本日期可能尚未頒布。出口商須直接聯繫SSB和EAS以確認：(1) 具體電動汽車充電樁產品和HS編碼是否需要強制合格評定或CoC；(2) 是否有適用的CARICOM或COPANT區域標準；(3) 蘇里南關稅表下電動汽車充電樁的海關分類和關稅處理。荷蘭語為蘇里南官方語言；面向蘇里南市場的產品文件、標籤和安全說明應以荷蘭語準備。

standards_or_laws: SSB (Suriname Standards Bureau) — national standards body, ISO member, IEC Affiliate Member (iso.org/member/548208)
CROSQ (CARICOM Regional Organisation for Standards and Quality) — regional standards affiliation
COPANT (Pan American Standards Commission) — regional standards affiliation
EAS (Energie Autoriteit Suriname) — energy sector regulatory authority (eas.sr)
Suriname Standards Act (wet op de Surinaamse Standaarden Bureau)
Suriname customs tariff schedule — EV charger HS code classification to confirm

summary.en: China-market chargers are commonly documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023 for conductive charging system requirements and GB/T 20234 connector standards, with China Compulsory Certification (CCC) applying where the charger falls within CCC scope. China CCC or GB/T test evidence may support engineering review if Suriname requires a technical file for market access, but it does not by itself establish SSB conformity status. Chinese product documentation and labelling is in Mandarin Chinese (Simplified); Suriname requires Dutch-language documentation for the local market.
summary.zh: 中国市场充电桩通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电系统要求及GB/T 20234连接器标准准备文件；如充电桩属于CCC适用范围，则须取得中国强制认证（CCC）。如苏里南要求提供技术档案进行市场准入，中国CCC或GB/T测试证据可支持工程审查，但其本身不能证明SSB合格评定状态。中国产品文件和标签为简体中文；苏里南本地市场需要荷兰语文件。
summary.zht: 中國市場充電樁通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電系統要求及GB/T 20234連接器標準準備文件；如充電樁屬於CCC適用範圍，則須取得中國強制認證（CCC）。如蘇里南要求提供技術檔案進行市場准入，中國CCC或GB/T測試證據可支持工程審查，但其本身不能證明SSB合格評定狀態。中國產品文件和標籤為簡體中文；蘇里南本地市場需要荷蘭語文件。

standards_or_laws: China CCC (3C) mandatory certification where in scope

gap.en: Exporters should: (1) contact SSB directly to determine whether a mandatory CoC or conformity assessment applies to the specific EV charger product and HS code for Suriname import; (2) contact EAS to confirm any regulatory approval or registration required for EV charger market entry; (3) prepare Dutch-language product documentation, labels, safety instructions, and installation manuals for the Suriname market; (4) confirm customs HS code classification and applicable import duty with a Suriname customs broker or freight forwarder; (5) confirm whether CARICOM regional standards (via CROSQ) or COPANT standards apply to the product category; (6) allow sufficient lead time for any required conformity assessment given SSB's nascent EV-charger regulatory environment. Do not assume automatic Suriname market access from China CCC, GB/T reports, or other country CoC documents alone.
gap.zh: 出口商应：(1) 直接联系SSB以确定具体电动汽车充电桩产品和HS编码进口苏里南是否需要强制CoC或合格评定；(2) 联系EAS确认电动汽车充电桩市场准入所需的任何监管批准或注册；(3) 为苏里南市场准备荷兰语产品文件、标签、安全说明和安装手册；(4) 向苏里南报关行或货运代理确认海关HS编码分类和适用进口关税；(5) 确认CARICOM区域标准（通过CROSQ）或COPANT标准是否适用于该产品类别；(6) 鉴于SSB电动汽车充电桩监管环境尚处于初期，为任何所需合格评定预留充足时间。不应仅凭中国CCC、GB/T报告或其他国家CoC文件宣称自动满足苏里南市场准入。
gap.zht: 出口商應：(1) 直接聯繫SSB以確定具體電動汽車充電樁產品和HS編碼進口蘇里南是否需要強制CoC或合格評定；(2) 聯繫EAS確認電動汽車充電樁市場准入所需的任何監管批准或注冊；(3) 為蘇里南市場準備荷蘭語產品文件、標籤、安全說明和安裝手冊；(4) 向蘇里南報關行或貨運代理確認海關HS編碼分類和適用進口關稅；(5) 確認CARICOM區域標準（通過CROSQ）或COPANT標準是否適用於該產品類別；(6) 鑑於SSB電動汽車充電樁監管環境尚處於初期，為任何所需合格評定預留充足時間。不應僅憑中國CCC、GB/T報告或其他國家CoC文件宣稱自動滿足蘇里南市場准入。

mandatory_status.target: Confirm with SSB/EAS — no mandatory published SSB CoC programme specifically for EV chargers confirmed from official sources as of 2026-06-14; Dutch-language documentation is a practical market requirement regardless of formal certification status; customs classification and import duty must be confirmed with Suriname authorities
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory or recommended depending on China CCC scope; GB/T evidence is not an SSB conformity substitute; Chinese-language documentation does not satisfy Suriname Dutch-language requirement

source.publisher: ISO — SSB (Suriname Standards Bureau) member profile

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Do not claim automatic Suriname market access from China CCC or GB/T reports alone. Contact SSB and EAS directly to verify current conformity assessment requirements for EV chargers. Prepare Dutch-language documentation for all product materials. Suriname's regulatory environment for EV chargers is nascent and may evolve rapidly given the country's offshore oil wealth and stated energy transition ambitions.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 不应仅凭中国CCC或GB/T报告宣称自动满足苏里南市场准入。直接联系SSB和EAS以核实电动汽车充电桩的现行合格评定要求。为所有产品资料准备荷兰语文件。苏里南电动汽车充电桩监管环境尚处于初期，鉴于该国近海石油财富和既定能源转型目标，相关规定可能迅速演变。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 不應僅憑中國CCC或GB/T報告宣稱自動滿足蘇里南市場准入。直接聯繫SSB和EAS以核實電動汽車充電樁的現行合格評定要求。為所有產品資料準備荷蘭語文件。蘇里南電動汽車充電樁監管環境尚處於初期，鑑於該國近海石油財富和既定能源轉型目標，相關規定可能迅速演變。

requirement_topic.en: Suriname EV Market Context — Nascent Market, Offshore Oil Wealth, and World Bank E-Mobility Initiative
requirement_topic.zh: 苏里南电动汽车市场背景——初期市场、近海石油财富与世界银行电动出行倡议
requirement_topic.zht: 蘇里南電動汽車市場背景——初期市場、近海石油財富與世界銀行電動出行倡議

summary.en: Suriname is a small Dutch-speaking country on the northern coast of South America with a population of approximately 625,000 (2024 estimate) and a member of CARICOM. Suriname's EV market is extremely nascent, with very limited publicly documented EV charging infrastructure as of 2026. The country's energy landscape is dominated by EBS (the national utility) and is characterised by significant electricity access challenges in interior regions. However, Suriname's discovery of large offshore oil reserves (Stabroek block area in cooperation with ExxonMobil and partners) positions it as a country with potential future investment capacity to fund energy transition infrastructure. The World Bank has engaged a consultancy to develop an 'Electric Mobility Pathway for Suriname' identifying enabling conditions, legal and regulatory gaps, and EV charging infrastructure requirements — signalling international recognition of Suriname's EV potential. EAS (the energy regulator) is a key stakeholder in any EV policy framework. Chinese EV charger exporters should treat Suriname as an emerging opportunity requiring close engagement with EAS, EBS, and SSB rather than a market with established procurement channels.
summary.zh: 苏里南是南美洲北部海岸的一个荷兰语小国，人口约62.5万（2024年估计），是加勒比共同体（CARICOM）成员。苏里南电动汽车市场极为初期，截至2026年公开记录的电动汽车充电基础设施极为有限。该国能源格局以EBS（国家电力公司）为主导，内陆地区存在严重的电力接入挑战。然而，苏里南发现大型近海油田（与埃克森美孚及合作伙伴共同开发的斯塔布鲁克区块），使其成为具备潜在未来投资能力以资助能源转型基础设施的国家。世界银行已聘请咨询机构制定《苏里南电动出行路径》，识别使能条件、法律和监管差距，以及电动汽车充电基础设施要求——标志着国际社会对苏里南电动汽车潜力的认可。EAS（能源监管机构）是任何电动汽车政策框架的关键利益相关方。中国电动汽车充电桩出口商应将苏里南视为需要与EAS、EBS和SSB密切接触的新兴机会，而非具有成熟采购渠道的市场。
summary.zht: 蘇里南是南美洲北部海岸的一個荷蘭語小國，人口約62.5萬（2024年估計），是加勒比共同體（CARICOM）成員。蘇里南電動汽車市場極為初期，截至2026年公開記錄的電動汽車充電基礎設施極為有限。該國能源格局以EBS（國家電力公司）為主導，內陸地區存在嚴重的電力接入挑戰。然而，蘇里南發現大型近海油田（與埃克森美孚及合作伙伴共同開發的斯塔布魯克區塊），使其成為具備潛在未來投資能力以資助能源轉型基礎設施的國家。世界銀行已聘請諮詢機構制定《蘇里南電動出行路徑》，識別使能條件、法律和監管差距，以及電動汽車充電基礎設施要求——標誌著國際社會對蘇里南電動汽車潛力的認可。EAS（能源監管機構）是任何電動汽車政策框架的關鍵利益相關方。中國電動汽車充電樁出口商應將蘇里南視為需要與EAS、EBS和SSB密切接觸的新興機會，而非具有成熟採購渠道的市場。

standards_or_laws: EAS (Energie Autoriteit Suriname) — energy sector regulatory authority, established 2016 (eas.sr)
EBS Corporate Strategy 2022–2030 — sustainable energy service and EV infrastructure plans
World Bank Electric Mobility Pathway for Suriname (project reference)
CARICOM membership — regional economic and standards framework
Suriname offshore oil development — Stabroek block (ExxonMobil, Hess, CNOOC)

summary.en: China's national EV infrastructure expansion is governed by the New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan (2021–2035) and related standards. China's large domestic market and manufacturing scale provide cost advantages for EV charger exports, but Suriname's nascent regulatory environment, Americas-region connector ecosystem, 60 Hz grid, Dutch-language documentation requirement, and small population create significant localisation and qualification work before any shipment. The World Bank's engagement also signals that international development finance (which may include Chinese lenders) could support Suriname EV infrastructure, creating procurement channels that would specify international technical standards rather than China domestic GB/T standards.
summary.zh: 中国国家电动汽车基础设施扩张由《新能源汽车产业发展规划（2021—2035年）》及相关标准管理。中国庞大的国内市场和制造规模为电动汽车充电桩出口提供了成本优势，但苏里南初期的监管环境、美洲地区接口体系、60 Hz电网、荷兰语文件要求和较小的人口规模，在任何出货前都需要大量本地化和资质工作。世界银行的介入也表明国际发展融资（可能包括中国贷款机构）可能支持苏里南电动汽车基础设施建设，形成将规定国际技术标准而非中国国内GB/T标准的采购渠道。
summary.zht: 中國國家電動汽車基礎設施擴張由《新能源汽車產業發展規劃（2021—2035年）》及相關標準管理。中國龐大的國內市場和製造規模為電動汽車充電樁出口提供了成本優勢，但蘇里南初期的監管環境、美洲地區接口體系、60 Hz電網、荷蘭語文件要求和較小的人口規模，在任何出貨前都需要大量本地化和資質工作。世界銀行的介入也表明國際發展融資（可能包括中國貸款機構）可能支持蘇里南電動汽車基礎設施建設，形成將規定國際技術標準而非中國國內GB/T標準的採購渠道。

standards_or_laws: New Energy Vehicle Industry Development Plan 2021–2035 (China)
China National Development and Reform Commission charging-station requirements

gap.en: Suriname's EV market does not yet have mature procurement channels or published mandatory technical standards for EV chargers. Chinese exporters should: (1) monitor EAS and EBS announcements for EV infrastructure tenders or regulatory updates; (2) engage the World Bank's Suriname e-mobility project outputs when published for insight into the regulatory framework being developed; (3) budget for connector redesign (J1772/CCS1), 60 Hz electrical re-validation, Dutch-language documentation, IEC safety testing, and regulatory engagement as pre-market costs; (4) consider partnering with a Suriname-based energy or electrical contractor to support EBS grid-connection and EAS regulatory coordination. The small market size means that pilot projects or government-backed infrastructure programmes are more likely entry points than commercial mass-market sales.
gap.zh: 苏里南电动汽车市场尚无成熟的采购渠道或已发布的电动汽车充电桩强制技术标准。中国出口商应：(1) 关注EAS和EBS关于电动汽车基础设施招标或监管更新的公告；(2) 关注世界银行苏里南电动出行项目成果发布，以了解正在制定的监管框架；(3) 将接口重新设计（J1772/CCS1）、60 Hz电气重新验证、荷兰语文件、IEC安全测试和监管接触列为市场前期成本；(4) 考虑与苏里南本地能源或电气承包商合作，支持EBS并网和EAS监管协调。市场规模较小意味着试点项目或政府支持的基础设施计划比商业大众市场销售更可能成为市场准入切入点。
gap.zht: 蘇里南電動汽車市場尚無成熟的採購渠道或已發佈的電動汽車充電樁強制技術標準。中國出口商應：(1) 關注EAS和EBS關於電動汽車基礎設施招標或監管更新的公告；(2) 關注世界銀行蘇里南電動出行項目成果發佈，以了解正在制定的監管框架；(3) 將接口重新設計（J1772/CCS1）、60 Hz電氣重新驗證、荷蘭語文件、IEC安全測試和監管接觸列為市場前期成本；(4) 考慮與蘇里南本地能源或電氣承包商合作，支持EBS併網和EAS監管協調。市場規模較小意味著試點項目或政府支持的基礎設施計劃比商業大眾市場銷售更可能成為市場准入切入點。

mandatory_status.target: Policy context — Suriname EV market is nascent with no confirmed mandatory EV charger procurement standard as of 2026-06-14; technical and regulatory requirements will likely follow IEC-aligned frameworks as the market develops under EAS guidance and World Bank e-mobility programme outputs
mandatory_status.cn: Policy context only — China EV policy and domestic volumes do not affect Suriname conformity, connector, grid, language, or regulatory obligations

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Suriname is an emerging EV market with potential driven by offshore oil wealth and World Bank e-mobility engagement, but with a nascent regulatory framework for EV chargers as of 2026. Chinese exporters must treat this as a greenfield market requiring direct engagement with EAS, EBS, and SSB — not an established market with published certification pathways. Budget for connector, grid, language, and regulatory localisation before entering.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 苏里南是一个由近海石油财富和世界银行电动出行参与驱动的新兴电动汽车市场，但截至2026年，电动汽车充电桩监管框架尚处于初期。中国出口商须将其视为需要直接与EAS、EBS和SSB接触的空白市场，而非具有已发布认证路径的成熟市场。进入前须为接口、电网、语言和监管本地化做好预算。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 蘇里南是一個由近海石油財富和世界銀行電動出行參與驅動的新興電動汽車市場，但截至2026年，電動汽車充電樁監管框架尚處於初期。中國出口商須將其視為需要直接與EAS、EBS和SSB接觸的空白市場，而非具有已發佈認證路徑的成熟市場。進入前須為接口、電網、語言和監管本地化做好預算。
